AI policy

AI policy packs · enforced at every gate

Versioned policy packs wired into agent loops — acceptable use, data handling, tool boundaries, human escalation.

Acceptable Use Policy Data Handling & De-ID Tool Boundary Rules Human Escalation Triggers Red-line BLOCK rules Policy versioning Receipt ledger Signed receipts Replay demo Monthly governance export

Plugs into your stack — framework-agnostic dispatch layer

MCP tool calls HTTP webhooks OpenTelemetry traces Policy pack YAML SIEM export (metadata-only)
Browse AI policy packs on witnessbc.com →

Procurement

Diligence at a glance

What security and procurement teams ask first — honest posture, no certification overclaim.

Self-hosted optionRun governance layer on your infrastructure when required
Shadow modeParallel install — zero production cutover during pilot
Metadata-only exportSIEM-ready governance metadata — not full prompt dumps
Fail-closed BLOCKRed-line violations stopped at dispatch
Policy version pinnedEvery receipt references policy pack version on disk
Export bundle on requestProcurement ZIP: policy map, replay proof, diligence summary

No SOC2 claim. No certification badges. Framework alignment maps are educational only — see Sources.

Request diligence pack + 15-min proof
Witness AI provides educational AI policy templates and governance workflow tooling — not legal, compliance, or certification services. Market statistics cite independent third-party research. Framework alignment is illustrative mapping only.
